info.name: Microsoft Bicep Get a Template Spec

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: templateSpecName
params.description: Name of the Template Spec

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

params.name: $expand
params.description: Allows for expansion of additional Template Spec details. Set to 'versions' to include version information.

items.docs: Gets a Template Spec with a given name.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep Create or update a Template Spec

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: templateSpecName
params.description: Name of the Template Spec

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

items.docs: Creates or updates a Template Spec. Template Specs enable you to store compiled Bicep templates as Azure resources for reuse and sharing.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep Update Template Spec tags

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: templateSpecName
params.description: Name of the Template Spec

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

items.docs: Updates Template Spec tags with specified values.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep Delete a Template Spec

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: templateSpecName
params.description: Name of the Template Spec

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

items.docs: Deletes a Template Spec by name. When the operation completes, status code 200 is returned without content.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep List Template Specs by resource group

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

params.name: $expand
params.description: Allows for expansion of additional Template Spec details. Set to 'versions' to include version information.

items.docs: Lists all the Template Specs within the specified resource group.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep List Template Specs by subscription

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

params.name: $expand
params.description: Allows for expansion of additional Template Spec details. Set to 'versions' to include version information.

items.docs: Lists all the Template Specs within the specified subscription.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep Get a Template Spec version

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: templateSpecName
params.description: Name of the Template Spec

params.name: templateSpecVersion
params.description: The version of the Template Spec

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

items.docs: Gets a Template Spec version by name.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep Create or update a Template Spec version

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: templateSpecName
params.description: Name of the Template Spec

params.name: templateSpecVersion
params.description: The version of the Template Spec

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

items.docs: Creates or updates a version of a Template Spec. Each version contains the actual compiled Bicep/ARM template content.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep Delete a Template Spec version

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: templateSpecName
params.description: Name of the Template Spec

params.name: templateSpecVersion
params.description: The version of the Template Spec

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

items.docs: Deletes a specific version from a Template Spec.

info.name: Microsoft Bicep List Template Spec versions

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Subscription ID which forms part of the URI for every service call

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

params.name: templateSpecName
params.description: Name of the Template Spec

params.name: api-version
params.description: Client API version

items.docs: Lists all the versions of a Template Spec.
